'''sadhopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crack|crack]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crack|crack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sadhopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædhepeth|sædhepeth]] || [[word:sædhepej|sædhepej]] || [[word:sædhepesh|sædhepesh]] || [[word:sædhepe|sædhepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadhodhopoth|sadhodhopoth]] || [[word:sadhodhopoj|sadhodhopoj]] || [[word:sadhodhoposh|sadhodhoposh]] || [[word:sadhodhopo|sadhodhopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadhopoth|sadhopoth]] || [[word:sadhopoj|sadhopoj]] || [[word:sadhoposh|sadhoposh]] || [[word:sadhopo|sadhopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadhofpoth|sadhofpoth]] || [[word:sadhofpoj|sadhofpoj]] || [[word:sadhofposh|sadhofposh]] || [[word:sadhofpof|sadhofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sadhopotho|sadhopotho]] || [[word:sadhopojo|sadhopojo]] || [[word:sadhoposho|sadhoposho]] || [[word:sadhopoko|sadhopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sadhopoth|sadhopoth]] || [[word:sadhopoj|sadhopoj]] || [[word:sadhoposh|sadhoposh]] || [[word:sadhopo|sadhopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sadhopothol|sadhopothol]] || [[word:sadhopojol|sadhopojol]] || [[word:sadhoposhol|sadhoposhol]] || [[word:sadhopokol|sadhopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sadhopothotho|sadhopothotho]] || [[word:sadhopojojo|sadhopojojo]] || [[word:sadhoposhosho|sadhoposhosho]] || [[word:sadhopoko|sadhopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sadhopothon|sadhopothon]] || [[word:sadhopojon|sadhopojon]] || [[word:sadhoposhon|sadhoposhon]] || [[word:sadhopokon|sadhopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sadhopothoro|sadhopothoro]] || [[word:sadhopojoro|sadhopojoro]] || [[word:sadhoposhoro|sadhoposhoro]] || [[word:sadhopokoro|sadhopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
